title: V Weldon
compiled_truth: V Weldon is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-07-05 to 2001-05-18), V Weldon sent 542 and received 167 emails, totalling 709 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Schlueter](people/mark-schlueter) (116), [Mark Breese](people/mark-breese) (39), [Bobby Eberle](people/bobby-eberle-gopusa) (38), [Mjones](people/mjones-gc) (32), [Cweldon](people/cweldon-houston) (31). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, ft__pierce, national_fuel, sent, sent_items.
